latin: Indulge tibi ipsi! hic est dies noster. meremur optima. visne tunicam novam? eme eam. visne cibum carum? ede eum. indulge tibi ipsi!

questions.prompt: What is the philosophy being expressed?
questions.target: Treat yourself to the best things
choices: Treat yourself to the best things

questions.prompt: What two examples of treating yourself are given?
questions.target: A new garment and expensive food
choices: A new garment and expensive food

translation: Treat yourself! This is our day. We deserve the best. Do you want a new shirt? Buy it. Do you want expensive food? Eat it. Treat yourself!
